mapper.select: SELECT broker_id, broker_password, broker_ty_cd, broker_nm, broker_office_nm, broker_reg_no, broker_bizrno, broker_spclty_cd, broker_email, broker_telno, broker_zip, broker_adres, broker_detail_adres, broker_use_yn, broker_regist_dt, broker_updt_dt FROM broker WHERE broker_id = #{brokerId}
